𝗢𝗣𝗘𝗡_𝗗𝗘𝗘𝗣_𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗘𝗔𝗥𝗖𝗛 | To provide a flexible and open-source platform for conducting deep research tasks, allowing users to customize and integrate different AI models and search functionalities.  📈 Growing!

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a flexible and open-source platform for conducting deep research tasks, allowing users to customize and integrate different AI models and search functionalities.
📅 Created: Nov 2024 • Updated: Apr 2026

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Configurable agent for deep research
✅ Supports multiple model providers
✅ Integrates with various search tools
✅ Compatible with MCP servers
✅ Performance on par with leading deep research agents
✅ Open-source implementation


⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Open Deep Research is an open-source agent application designed for deep research tasks. It offers high configurability, supporting various model providers, search tools, and MCP servers, and aims to match the performance of popular commercial deep research agents.

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/langchain-ai/open_deep_research

𝗦𝗘𝗥𝗩𝗘𝗥 | To provide a self-hosted, secure, and collaborative platform for file storage, sharing, and document editing, ensuring data sovereignty and user control.  🔥 Super Hot!

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a self-hosted, secure, and collaborative platform for file storage, sharing, and document editing, ensuring data sovereignty and user control.
📅 Created: Jul 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Modern, Fast, and High-Performance Interface
✅ Modern Identity & Authentication (OIDC, LDAP, MFA)
✅ Advanced User Access Control (Spaces & Shares, RBAC)
✅ Collaborative Editing (Collabora Online, OnlyOffice)
✅ Powerful Full-Text Search
✅ Document Management & File Protection (Storage quotas, file locking)
✅ Sovereign & Self-Hosted by Design
✅ WebDAV Access

Sync-in Server is a self-hosted, open-source platform for secure file storage, sharing, and real-time collaboration. It provides users with full data ownership and control, integrating with modern authentication methods and offering advanced access controls for seamless teamwork.

𝗠𝗘𝗠𝗨 | To provide a persistent, structured, and cost-effective memory solution for always-on AI agents, enabling them to understand user intent and act proactively.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a persistent, structured, and cost-effective memory solution for always-on AI agents, enabling them to understand user intent and act proactively.
📅 Created: Jul 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ 24/7 Proactive Agent
✅ User Intention Capture
✅ Memory as File System
✅ Reduced LLM Token Cost
✅ Open Source Alternative to OpenClaw


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 13.4K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 64 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

memU is a Python memory framework designed for 24/7 proactive AI agents. It aims to significantly reduce LLM token costs by providing a structured, file-system-like memory that continuously captures and understands user intent, enabling agents to act proactively without constant explicit commands.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/NevaMind-AI/memU

𝗞𝗜𝗥𝗢 | To accelerate software development by providing an AI-powered IDE and CLI that understands codebase context, automates tasks, and facilitates spec-driven feature building.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To accelerate software development by providing an AI-powered IDE and CLI that understands codebase context, automates tasks, and facilitates spec-driven feature building.
📅 Created: Jun 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Specs for structured development plans
✅ Hooks for automating repetitive tasks
✅ Agentic Chat for natural language coding assistance
✅ Steering for custom rules and project context
✅ MCP Servers for external tool integration
✅ Powers for extending agent capabilities
✅ Privacy-first design


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Kiro is an agentic IDE and CLI that streamlines software development from prototyping to production. It leverages AI for natural language coding assistance, spec-driven development, and automation of repetitive tasks through intelligent hooks and agent powers.

Web-Check is a comprehensive OSINT tool written in TypeScript that analyzes websites to provide insights into their inner workings. It helps users understand, optimize, and secure their sites by uncovering potential attack vectors, analyzing server architecture, and identifying used technologies.
